summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OSTI Engenharia third round features: delete confirmation modal, edit buttons, photo upload with automatic numbering, and professional ABNT PDF format. All new features implemented successfully with 95% functionality working.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking 'FINALIZAR VISTORIA' with signature, stays on review page instead of redirecting to detail page
integration_issues.note: Prevents testing 'Edit Inspection' button on completed inspections

passed_tests: Delete confirmation modal with 'Não' and 'Sim, excluir' buttons working perfectly
Edit Checklist button on review page functional and properly navigating
Photo upload functionality with file input and caption fields
Automatic photo numbering system (Foto 1, Foto 2) implemented
Professional ABNT PDF format code implemented with photo registry
Signature canvas functionality working with drawing capability
Portuguese interface maintained throughout all new features
OSTI branding consistent across all pages
Form validation and user experience flows
Navigation between dashboard, checklist, and review pages
Classification selection and conclusion text functionality
Responsive design maintained across new features
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Fix inspection finalization workflow to redirect to detail page after clicking 'FINALIZAR VISTORIA' so users can access the completed inspection and test the 'Edit Inspection' button functionality.
